summary: Attribution schema migration completed successfully. Added 13 columns to trades table with idempotent migration, created meta table for version tracking, and implemented TradeAttribution dataclass with classify_trade() and write_jsonl() functions.
migration_idempotency_proof: Ran migration twice in test: first run created all 13 columns and 2 indexes (31 total columns after), second run completed with no additional changes (still 31 columns). Column count remained constant, confirming idempotency.
notes: Migration is integrated into init_db() which is called at startup. Existing trades data is preserved with NULL values for new columns. Meta table added to track attribution_schema_version=1. All 5 trade_class enum values tested and working: MODEL_WIN_EXPECTED, MODEL_WIN_LUCKY, MODEL_LOSS_EXPECTED, MODEL_LOSS_EXECUTION, UNRESOLVED.
next_steps: Ready for TRADE_ATTRIBUTION_WIRING_001 to add attribution data capture in paper execution and wiring logic to populate these columns during trade lifecycle.
